ac_evidence.ac: Agriculture: crop growth stages, yield based on soil fertility and weather
ac_evidence.evidence: processAgriculture implements growth stages and yield calculation using environment fields; TestProductionAgriculture passes

ac_evidence.ac: Mining: resource extraction with depletion and regeneration
ac_evidence.evidence: processMining implements depletion and regeneration; TestProductionMining passes

ac_evidence.ac: Crafting: transform raw materials into goods
ac_evidence.evidence: processCrafting consumes ore and produces tools; TestProductionCrafting passes

ac_evidence.ac: Construction: building progress based on assigned workers and materials
ac_evidence.evidence: processConstruction uses workers and consumes wood/stone; TestProductionConstruction passes

ac_evidence.ac: Production rates affected by resident skills and building levels
ac_evidence.evidence: Building level used in yield and extraction calculations; resident skills not yet implemented (future workstream)

ac_evidence.ac: Deterministic output based on RNG seed
go test ./internal/simulation -run TestProduction passes with ≥80% coverage

existing_work_summary: No existing production system; System interface defined in system.go; GameState includes Resources and Buildings; Environment system provides weather/soil fertility affecting agriculture.
